intended_use_full: MI View&GO is a medical diagnostic application for viewing, manipulation, quantification, analysis and comparison of medical images with one or more time-points. MI View&GO supports functional data, such as positron emission tomography (PET) or nuclear medicine (NM), as well as anatomical datasets, such as computed tomography (CT) or magnetic resonance (MR). MI View&GO is intended to be utilized by appropriately trained health care professionals to aid in the management of diseases associated with oncology, cardiology, neurology, and organ function. The images and results produced by MI View&GO can also be used by the physician to aid in radiotherapy treatment planning.
target_condition: diseases associated with oncology, cardiology, neurology, and organ function
